text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon May 26 15:32:42 2014
New Revision: 355365
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355365
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355365/

Log:
  - Update to 0.33
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/RRDTool-OO/Changes
  PR:		ports/190215
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-RRDTool-OO/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-RRDTool-OO/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-RRDTool-OO/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-RRDTool-OO/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:32:25 2014	(r355364)
+++ head/devel/p5-RRDTool-OO/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:32:42 2014	(r355365)
@@ -2,15 +2,17 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	RRDTool-OO
-PORTVERSION=	0.32
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	0.33
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	RRDTool::OO - Object-oriented interface to RRDTool
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	rrdtool>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/rrdtool \
 		p5-Log-Log4perl>=0.40:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Log-Log4perl
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
